findings.reason: communication contains prohibited promissory, guarantee, or 'no-risk' language
findings.remediation: Remove or substantiate; guarantees, 'risk-free', and 'cannot-lose' claims are prohibited.

findings.reason: communication predicts or projects future investment performance
findings.remediation: Remove predictions/projections of performance or limit to permitted projection use with basis and disclosures.

findings.reason: benefits/returns are described without a corresponding risk disclosure (one-sided)
findings.remediation: Add balanced discussion of material risks and a risk disclosure.

findings.reason: one or more required disclosures for this communication class are absent
findings.remediation: Add each missing required disclosure before the communication is used.

findings.reason: retail communication has no registered-principal pre-approval before first use
findings.remediation: Obtain registered-principal (e.g., Series 24/26) pre-approval before first use.

findings.reason: communication is not recorded as archived in an approved retention system
findings.remediation: Confirm the communication is captured and retained in the approved archive.

remediation_prompts: Remove or substantiate; guarantees, 'risk-free', and 'cannot-lose' claims are prohibited.
Remove predictions/projections of performance or limit to permitted projection use with basis and disclosures.
Add balanced discussion of material risks and a risk disclosure.
Add each missing required disclosure before the communication is used.
Obtain registered-principal (e.g., Series 24/26) pre-approval before first use.
Confirm the communication is captured and retained in the approved archive.
disclaimer: Advisory compliance review only; not a supervisory approval, regulated determination, or filing. A registered principal must independently review and adjudicate this communication before any use, distribution, regulatory filing, or review closure.
narrative: Communications review of COMM-90001 (a retail communication on social media, 4,200 recipients over 30 days) identified 6 finding types. The material contains prohibited guarantee and no-risk claims and a prediction of future performance, lacks a corresponding risk disclosure, is missing required retail disclosures (member name, past-performance disclaimer, BrokerCheck reference, testimonial disclosures), has no registered-principal pre-approval on record, and is not shown as retained in an approved archive. Recommended disposition: Escalate. These are findings and cited evidence only; a registered principal must weigh them and adjudicate the disposition and any remediation. Advisory compliance review only; not a supervisory approval, regulated determination, or filing. A registered principal must independently review and adjudicate this communication before any use, distribution, regulatory filing, or review closure.
